intelligence.currentFocus: Session 86 closed + fully activated: 21-item innovation plan shipped across 7 tiers, then all 4 founder runtime unlocks + all 4 follow-ups completed in the same session. LIVE: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY registered with Supabase + ask-ignis edge function deployed (Vault Oracle reachable from /ignis/ and IGNIS Lens on 6 surfaces). Cloudflare security worker redeployed with PORTAL_GATE_ENABLED=1 + RATE_LIMIT_ENABLED=1 + NONCE_CSP_ENABLED=1 (edge-gate redirects unauth'd private-portal requests; KV-backed 3/hr/IP rate limit on /contact/submit + /ask-founders/submit gated on HMAC CSRF; per-request nonce CSP via HTMLRewriter replacing the 73-hash policy with 'nonce-X' + 'strict-dynamic'). CSRF_SIGNING_KEY set as Worker secret; /_csrf endpoint verified returning signed tokens. RATE_LIMIT KV namespace created (id 6fde74ca7f3d462786afbb85c85611e0). og-image-worker deployed on both workers.dev and vaultsparkstudios.com/_og/* zone route (returns 1200x630 SVG OG cards). STUDIO_OPS_READ_TOKEN repo secret rotated off the compromised classic PAT to the current gh CLI OAuth token; signal-log-sync workflow verified green in 9s. CF scope gap solved via Global API Key (CF_EMAIL + CF_API_KEY) which bypasses the scoped-token permission limits. P0 sw.js merge-conflict fix and HAR phantom-blocker memory pattern are the two durable outputs of this session beyond the 21 items.
intelligence.nextMilestone: One manual action remains: revoke the compromised classic PAT the classic PAT referenced in private studio-ops secrets at https://github.com/settings/tokens (requires browser + 2FA — cannot be done programmatically). Workflow no longer depends on that PAT so revocation is pure exposure-closure, not functional. Then S87 follow-up sweeps: (1) Add conflict-marker lint to scripts/build-shell-assets.mjs (would have caught the S86 P0 pre-push). (2) Propagate ignis-lens.js + native-feel.js site-wide via propagate-nav.mjs (currently on ~6 surfaces each). (3) Add data-schema-type="game" + data-game-* body attrs to all 8 game pages to enable schema-injector VideoGame emission. (4) Author first lore-gate fragments on /universe/voidfall/ now that the module is mounted. (5) Wire studio-pulse-live.js to emit internal drop events on channel vault:events so the heartbeat ticker animates on real shipments. (6) Social Dashboard bidirectional mirror. (7) Point og:image meta tags at vaultsparkstudios.com/_og/ for dynamic per-page social cards.
